inputs.label: Total Work Content (TWC)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all standard times for operations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 time measurement).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all standard times for operations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 time measurement).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dikiş hattındaki operasyonlar için tüm standart sürelerin toplamı (ISO 9001 zaman ölçümü).
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller Standardzeiten für Arbeitsgänge in der Nählinie (ISO 9001 Zeitmessung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de tous les temps standards pour les opérations de la ligne de couture (mesure de temps ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los tiempos estándar para las operaciones en la línea de costura (medición de tiempo ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Number of Operators
inputs.businessContext: Total direct labor assigned to the line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total direct labor assigned to the line.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte direkte Arbeitskräfte, die der Linie zugewiesen sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Main-d'œuvre directe totale affectée à la ligne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Mano de obra directa total asignada a la línea.

inputs.label: Takt Time
inputs.businessContext: Customer demand rate: available production time divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Customer demand rate: available production time divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri talep hızı: mevcut üretim süresinin gerekli çıktıya bölünmesi (Yalın üretim).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kundennachfragerate: verfügbare Produktionszeit geteilt durch erforderliche Ausbringung (Lean Manufacturing).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de demande client : temps de production disponible divisé par la production requise (Lean manufacturing).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de demanda del cliente: tiempo de producción disponible dividido por la producción requerida (Lean manufacturing).

inputs.label: Bottleneck Station Time
inputs.businessContext: Longest operation time among all stations (Theory of Constraints).

businessContext_i18n.en: Longest operation time among all stations (Theory of Constraints).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm istasyonlar arasındaki en uzun operasyon süresi (Kısıtlar Teorisi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Längste Bearbeitungszeit aller Stationen (Theory of Constraints).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps d'opération le plus long parmi tous les postes (Théorie des contraintes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de operación más largo entre todas las estaciones (Teoría de Restricciones).

inputs.label: Line Balance Type
inputs.businessContext: Configuration of the sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).

businessContext_i18n.en: Configuration of the sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dikiş hattının konfigürasyonu: düz, U-şekilli veya modüler (Yalın yerleşim prensipleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Konfiguration der Nählinie: gerade, U-förmig oder modular (Lean-Layout-Prinzipien).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Configuration de la ligne de couture : droite, en U ou modulaire (principes Lean d'implantation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Configuración de la línea de costura: recta, en U o modular (principios Lean de distribución).

inputs.label: Allow Rebalancing
inputs.businessContext: If true, the tool will suggest operator reassignment to improve balance.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, the tool will suggest operator reassignment to improve balance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, araç dengeyi iyileştirmek için operatör yeniden ataması önerecektir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, schlägt das Tool eine Neuzuweisung von Bedienern vor, um den Ausgleich zu verbessern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, l'outil suggérera une réaffectation des opérateurs pour améliorer l'équilibre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, la herramienta sugerirá reasignación de operarios para mejorar el balance.

rules.message: Total Work Content must be greater than zero.
Number of Operators must be at least 1.
Bottleneck time must not exceed takt time to meet demand.
Average work per operator exceeds takt time; line cannot meet demand.

thresholds.message: Balance efficiency below 80% – significant idle time or overload.
Balance efficiency below 60% – line is severely unbalanced.
Bottleneck exceeds takt time – demand cannot be met without overtime or rebalancing.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
